name: Dynatrace, Inc.
business: Dynatrace sells a unified observability, runtime application security, and AI operations platform. The platform is deployed by large enterprises to monitor and manage complex IT environments across hybrid multicloud ecosystems.

exposures.sentence: AI Observability (LLM and Agentic AI Observability) provides observability to improve the performance, resilience, explainability, and compliance of generative AI applications, large language models ( LLMs ), and agentic systems - including agent-to-agent interactions and actions taken by agents to better monitor and manage these workloads.

Application Security automatically and continuously detects runtime vulnerabilities in applications, libraries, and code. It also provides near real-time detection and blocking to help protect against third-party cyber-attacks that can exploit critical vulnerabilities.

Log Management and Analytics provides a unified approach to unlock the value of log data in the Dynatrace platform and can be developed for different use cases with enterprise-grade extensibility and customization.
